# x402 Video

> Pay-per-call AI video generation over the x402 payment protocol.
> No accounts, no API keys, no credit cards: HTTP 402 -> pay USDC on Base -> generate.

The canonical, always-current machine-readable storefront (SKUs, live prices, endpoints,
content policy) is served by the gateway itself:

- https://api.x402-video.com/llms.txt — agent-readable storefront (markdown)
- https://api.x402-video.com/ — storefront (JSON)
- https://api.x402-video.com/status — live success rate, p50 generation time, delivered count

## How to buy

1. POST a generation endpoint (e.g. /generate/seedance/5s-720p) -> HTTP 402 with payment requirements.
2. Pay with any x402 client (`@x402/fetch` handles 402 -> pay -> retry automatically).
3. Paid response returns { job_id, status_url } immediately.
4. Poll GET /jobs/:id (free) until status is succeeded; download video_url within 24h.

## Source

- https://github.com/x402-video — organization
- https://github.com/x402-video/web — this storefront
